comments: Tommy Vance plays two tracks in a row from AC/DC.

sessions.artist: Rough Justice One and only session
Can Recorded by Tony Wilson at BBC Studios 29th January 1974
sessions.details: Single Tx on 12th February 1974. Can: Irmin Schmidt, Jaki Liebezeit, Holger Czukay, Michael Karoli.

track_listing.track: 'Rock n Roll Preacher (Hallelujah I'm on Fire)' (LP - Till Deaf Do Us Part) RCA
'What You're Doing To Me' (V/A LP - Metal Explosion Volume 2 (From the Friday Rock Show)) BBC
'Deep Distance' (LP - New Age Of Earth) Virgin
'Evil Walks' (LP - For Those About To Rock (We Salute You)) Atlantic
'Breaking The Rules' (LP - For Those About To Rock (We Salute You)) Atlantic
'Flirtin' With Disaster' (LP - Flirtin' With Disaster) Epic
'Under The Rose' (LP - (Music From) The Elder) Casablanca
